flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Imperial Valley College are 18% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.5k vs $42.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Imperial Valley College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.6k → $8.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Imperial Valley College rose 101% between 2007 and 2010 (11.7% → 23.6%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Imperial Valley College rose 42% between 2007 and 2010 (5.2k → 7.4k).
